title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions
company: Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions:
Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions!
